mapper.sql: o.id, o.course_id, o.teacher_id, o.teacher_name, o.academic_year, o.semester, o.capacity, o.selected_count, o.selection_start_time, o.selection_end_time, o.class_time, o.classroom, o.offering_status, o.remark, o.deleted, o.create_time, o.update_time, c.course_code, c.course_name, c.course_type, c.college, c.credits, c.total_hours
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO teaching_course_offering (course_id, teacher_id, teacher_name, academic_year, semester, capacity, selected_count, selection_start_time, selection_end_time, class_time, classroom, offering_status, remark) VALUES (#{courseId}, #{teacherId}, #{teacherName}, #{academicYear}, #{semester}, #{capacity}, 0, #{selectionStartTime}, #{selectionEndTime}, #{classTime}, #{classroom}, #{offeringStatus}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE teaching_course_offering SET course_id=#{courseId}, teacher_id=#{teacherId}, teacher_name=#{teacherName}, academic_year=#{academicYear}, semester=#{semester}, capacity=#{capacity}, selection_start_time=#{selectionStartTime}, selection_end_time=#{selectionEndTime}, class_time=#{classTime}, classroom=#{classroom}, offering_status=#{offeringStatus}, remark=#{remark}, update_time=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted=0
UPDATE teaching_course_offering SET offering_status=#{offeringStatus}, update_time=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted=0
UPDATE teaching_course_offering SET selected_count=GREATEST(0, selected_count + #{delta}), update_time=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted=0
UPDATE teaching_course_offering SET deleted=1, update_time=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted=0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM teaching_course_offering o INNER JOIN teaching_course c ON c.id=o.course_id AND c.deleted=0 WHERE o.id=#{id} AND o.deleted=0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM teaching_course_offering o INNER JOIN teaching_course c ON c.id=o.course_id AND c.deleted=0
SELECT FROM teaching_course_offering o INNER JOIN teaching_course c ON c.id=o.course_id AND c.deleted=0 WHERE o.teacher_id=#{teacherId} AND o.deleted=0 ORDER BY o.create_time DESC, o.id DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM teaching_course_enrollment WHERE offering_id=#{id} AND deleted=0 AND enrollment_status='SELECTED'
